description: Get structured forex signals with professional analysis and risk-first levels
heroDescription: Get structured Forex signals with clear entry, stop loss, take profit, and real-time status updates
noSignalsFound: No signals found with this symbol
tryDifferentPair: Try searching for a different currency pair
trustQualityDescription: Signals are filtered for clear setups instead of filling the feed with low-conviction ideas.
trustAnalysisDescription: Each setup is reviewed with price action, market structure, and key support or resistance levels.
trustRiskDescription: Every signal includes stop loss and take profit levels so risk is visible before entry.
trustTelegramDescription: Trade alerts are delivered through Telegram with compact entry, exit, and status information.
trustDetailsDescription: Details pages show status, result, timing, and analysis context for easier review.
trustTrackingDescription: Closed signals are tracked by result without promising guaranteed profit or fixed win rates.
howItWorksDescription: A simple workflow keeps each trade idea structured from analysis to result tracking.
faqProfitAnswer: No. Forex and gold trading carry risk. Signals provide structured trade ideas, but every trader is responsible for position sizing and execution.
faqSignalIncludesAnswer: Each signal includes symbol, direction, entry, stop loss, take profit, timing, and tracked result where available.
faqHomepageSignalsQuestion: How many signals are shown on the homepage?
faqHomepageSignalsAnswer: The homepage only shows the latest three signals. The full paginated list is available on the Signals page.
faqRiskAnswer: A clear stop loss and position size help keep one losing trade from damaging the entire account.
riskDisclaimerText: Forex and CFD trading involve significant risk and may not be suitable for every trader. Signals are market analysis, not guaranteed outcomes. Use appropriate position sizing, review each setup independently, and never risk money you cannot afford to lose.
signUpText: Join our Telegram channel to receive structured signal updates with clear risk and exit levels.

footer.providerDescription: Provider of structured forex signals with clear risk levels and transparent tracking

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Contact us for any questions, suggestions, or collaboration requests
contactPage.onlineSupportText: Our online support is available every day of the week from 8 AM to 8 PM to answer your questions
contactPage.subject: Subject
contactPage.successMessage: Your message has been sent successfully!
contactPage.telegramSubtitle: Telegram is the fastest support channel for signal questions, account help, and trade update issues.
contactPage.telegramSupportText: Use Telegram for the quickest support response and signal delivery updates.

aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.introduction: Signal Forex was established with the goal of providing the best trading signals and accurate analysis of financial markets
aboutPage.whoWeAreText1: Signal Forex is a team of professional analysts and experienced traders in financial markets that started its activities in 2016. Our goal is to provide the best trading signals with high accuracy for currency, gold, stock, and other financial markets.
aboutPage.whoWeAreText2: We provide the best entry and exit points for traders using advanced technical and fundamental analysis techniques. Our team consists of specialists in various areas of financial markets who monitor markets around the clock.
aboutPage.ourMissionText: Our mission is to help traders achieve sustainable profitability in financial markets by providing accurate signals and professional training
aboutPage.qualityText: Providing high-quality and accurate signals to ensure customer profitability
aboutPage.educationText: Continuous training of traders to increase their skills and knowledge in financial markets
aboutPage.innovationText: Continuous updating of analysis methods and providing the latest trading techniques
aboutPage.supportText: Providing 24-hour support to customers to answer questions and guide them
aboutPage.joinUsText: By signing up on the Signal Forex site, benefit from the best trading signals and specialized analysis to increase your profitability.
aboutPage.heroTitle: Practical Signal Analysis, Clear Risk, Transparent Results
aboutPage.heroText: We publish trade ideas with defined entry, stop loss, take profit, status, and tracked outcomes. The goal is not to promise easy profit; it is to make signal review disciplined, readable, and risk-aware.
aboutPage.builtForUsersText1: A useful signal platform should make the important information easy to inspect: what to trade, where the entry is, where the trade is invalidated, what the target is, and how the idea was resolved.
aboutPage.builtForUsersText2: Our interface focuses on compact signal tables, mobile-friendly cards, live updates, and result tracking so users can follow the market without sorting through noisy claims.
aboutPage.missionText: Help traders review structured forex and gold trade ideas with clear levels, timing, and outcome tracking.
aboutPage.analysisMethodText: Signals are built around market structure, price action, support and resistance, volatility, and session context.
aboutPage.riskManagementText: Every signal is designed around defined stop loss and take profit levels before it is published.
aboutPage.transparentTrackingText: Open and closed signals are shown with status and result data so users can review performance without exaggerated claims.

blogPage.title: Financial News & Market Updates

blogPage.disclaimerText: The information provided in this article is for informational purposes only and should not be considered as financial advice. Always conduct your own research before making any investment decisions.

analytics.heroDescription: TradeZella-style reporting: performance, drawdown, playbook/setup quality, costly mistakes, emotions, tags, symbols, and time windows in one workspace.

analytics.addSetupNames: Add setup or playbook names to trades.
analytics.closedTradesNeeded: Closed trades with open time are needed.
analytics.noClosedTrades: No closed trades found. Import or close trades to populate advanced analytics.
analytics.equityDescription: Cumulative net P&L ordered by close time.
analytics.longShortDescription: BUY and SELL realized performance compared side by side.
analytics.sessionPerformanceDescription: Open time grouped by approximate UTC trading session.
analytics.symbolAnalyticsDescription: Click a column header to sort symbol performance.
analytics.hourlyDecisionDescription: A quick read on when your journal is making or losing money.
analytics.noStrategyData: No strategy data available yet. Add strategyName or magicNumber to trades to enable strategy analytics.
analytics.noPsychologyFilter: No psychology analytics match the active filters.
analytics.noPsychologyData: No psychology data available yet. Add psychology tracking to trades to enable this report.
analytics.calculatedReadOnly: Calculated fields are read-only. Journal metadata is editable.

analytics.noClosedTradesInBucket: No closed trades in this bucket.

analytics.highestHourlyPnl: Highest realized net P&L by opening hour.
analytics.lowestHourlyPnl: Lowest realized net P&L by opening hour.
analytics.largestTradeShare: Largest share of trades, useful for spotting overtrading.
analytics.decisionRuleDescription: Start with the top positive hour and the weakest negative hour. Treat the edge as provisional until the filter has at least 20 closed trades.
analytics.currentRead: Current read: prioritize {bestHour} and inspect {worstHour} before adding risk.
analytics.noTradesForReport: No trades found for this report.
analytics.noEquityCurve: No closed trades yet. Equity curve appears after realized trades exist.
